en-US.name: Jellyfin Music
en-US.summary: Voice-controlled music playback from a self-hosted Jellyfin server.
en-US.description: Play music from your own Jellyfin media server by voice. Say things like 'play some Daft Punk' or 'play my Chill playlist' and Alexa streams it directly from your Jellyfin library.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask jelly fin to play Daft Punk
Alexa, tell jelly fin to play my Chill playlist
Alexa, ask jelly fin to open

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Requires a self-hosted Jellyfin server reachable at the configured endpoint.
